title: Smoky Irish Chicken Curry
description: A flavorful and aromatic chicken curry dish made with the spices of India, smoky flavor, and tender Irish chicken.
instructions: Heat oil in a large pan over medium heat.
Add the spice blend (smoky paprika, ground cumin, coriander, and turmeric) and cook for 1 minute.
Add the chicken and cook until browned on all sides, about 5-6 minutes.
Add the chopped dates and stir to combine.
Pour in chicken broth and bring to a simmer.
Reduce heat to low and let cook for 15-20 minutes, or until the chicken is cooked through.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with fresh cilantro.
